tasks.label: setup random test
tasks.command: Get-Content 'C:/Users/syunr/cp/cptemplate/generator.cpp' | Set-Content 'gen.cpp'; Get-Content 'C:/Users/syunr/cp/cptemplate/template.cpp' | Set-Content 'ans.cpp'; code gen.cpp ans.cpp

tasks.label: run random test (compare)
tasks.command: g++ gen.cpp -o gen.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ ${file} -o sol.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ ans.cpp -o ans.exe -O2 -std=c++23; for ($i=1; $i -le 20; $i++) { cmd /c '.\gen.exe > in.txt && .\sol.exe < in.txt > out.txt && .\ans.exe < in.txt > ans.txt'; C:/Users/syunr/cp/cpchecker/checker.exe out.txt ans.txt; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Test' $i '[WA]'; code in.txt out.txt ans.txt; break } else { Write-Host 'Test' $i '[AC]' }; }; rm gen.exe; rm sol.exe; rm ans.exe

tasks.label: run random test (judge)
tasks.command: g++ gen.cpp -o gen.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ ${file} -o sol.exe -O2 -std=c++23; g++ ans.cpp -o ans.exe -O2 -std=c++23; for ($i=1; $i -le 20; $i++) { cmd /c '.\gen.exe > in.txt && .\sol.exe < in.txt > out.txt'; Get-Content 'in.txt' | Set-Content 'inout.txt'; Get-Content 'out.txt' | Add-Content 'inout.txt'; cmd /c '.\ans.exe < inout.txt'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Test' $i 'WA'; code in.txt out.txt; break } else { Write-Host 'Test' $i 'AC' }; }; rm gen.exe; rm sol.exe; rm ans.exe; rm inout.txt
